Stage 4 Pressure Ulcers Discharge Unstageable on Admission Number CHAR 1 The number of stage 4 pressure ulcers at discharge that were unstageable at admission.
274 DML_IND DML_IND I2900A Diabetes Mellitus Code CHAR 1 The code for whether the patient had a diagnosis of Diabetes Mellitus. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No
1=Yes
275 DBTC_RETINOPATHY_IND DBTC_RETINOPATHY_IND I2900B Diabetic Retinopathy Code CHAR 1 The code for whether the patient had an active diagnosis of diabetic
